<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0">
<title>MYM Developers — Project Platform</title>
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{font-family:Arial,sans-serif;background:#f0f2f5;min-height:100vh}
.login-screen{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:100vh;padding:24px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1F3864 0%,#2E5090 100%);}
.login-box{background:white;border-radius:14px;padding:28px 24px;width:100%;max-width:340px;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.25);}
.login-box h2{font-size:15px;color:#1F3864;margin-bottom:18px;text-align:center;}
.field-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;color:#595959;margin-bottom:5px;display:block;}
.field-input{width:100%;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid #D9D9D9;border-radius:6px;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:12px;}
.field-input:focus{outline:none;border-color:#4472C4;}
.login-btn{width:100%;padding:11px;background:#1F3864;color:white;border:none;border-radius:7px;font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:6px;}
.login-btn:active{background:#2E5090;}
.login-err{color:#C00000;font-size:11px;margin-top:6px;text-align:center;display:none;}
.role-tabs{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:16px;}
.role-tab{flex:1;padding:7px;border:1px solid #D9D9D9;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;text-align:center;background:white;color:#595959;}
.role-tab.active{background:#1F3864;color:white;border-color:#1F3864;font-weight:bold;}
.topbar{background:#1F3864;color:white;padding:10px 14px;position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.3);}
.topbar-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}
.topbar h1{font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;}
.topbar-sub{font-size:10px;color:#90B8D8;margin-top:2px;}
.topbar-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.role-badge{font-size:9px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:bold;}
.role-badge.admin{background:#C6EFCE;color:#276221;}
.role-badge.staff{background:#DEEAF1;color:#2E5090;}
.role-badge.owner{background:#FFEB9C;color:#9C5700;}
.signout-btn{font-size:9px;color:#90B8D8;background:transparent;border:1px solid #4472C4;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;}
.sync-dot{display:inline-block;width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:#4CAF50;margin-right:3px;}
.sync-dot.saving{background:#FFD966;animation:pulse 1s infinite;}
.sync-dot.error{background:#FF6B6B;}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.3}}
.legend{display:flex;gap:8px;padding:5px 12px;background:#2E5090;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.legend-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;font-size:10px;color:white;}
.legend-dot{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:2px;}
.nav-bar{background:#1a2a4a;padding:5px 12px;display:flex;gap:5px;overflow-x:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;}
.nav-btn{padding:5px 12px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #4472C4;background:transparent;color:#90B8D8;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0;}
.nav-btn.active{background:#4472C4;color:white;font-weight:bold;}
.dashboard{padding:12px;}
.dash-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:bold;color:#1F3864;margin-bottom:10px;padding-bottom:6px;border-bottom:2px solid #4472C4;}
.project-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:10px;}
.project-card{background:white;border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.08);cursor:pointer;}
.project-card:active{opacity:.9;}
.pc-header{padding:12px 14px;color:white;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;}
.pc-name{font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;}
.pc-count{font-size:10px;opacity:.85;margin-top:2px;}
.pc-pct{font-size:20px;font-weight:bold;color:rgba(255,255,255,.9);}
.pc-body{padding:10px 14px;}
.pc-stat{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;color:#595959;margin-bottom:3px;}
.pc-stat strong{color:#1F3864;}
.pc-open{width:100%;margin-top:8px;padding:7px;color:white;border:none;border-radius:5px;font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;}
.bldg-list{padding:10px 12px;}
.back-btn{background:#4472C4;color:white;border:none;padding:6px 13px;border-radius:5px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:10px;}
.section-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:8px;}
.view-toggle{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.vt-btn{padding:5px 12px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #4472C4;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;}
.vt-btn.active{background:#4472C4;color:white;font-weight:bold;}
.vt-btn.inactive{background:transparent;color:#4472C4;}
.bldg-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(200px,1fr));gap:8px;}
.bldg-card{background:white;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.08);cursor:pointer;}
.bldg-card:active{opacity:.8;}
.bldg-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;color:#1F3864;margin-bottom:4px;}
.bldg-bar-wrap{height:5px;background:#E2EFDA;border-radius:3px;margin-bottom:5px;}
.bldg-bar{height:100%;border-radius:3px;transition:width .4s;}
.bldg-pct{font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;}
.bldg-stats{font-size:10px;color:#808080;margin-top:2px;}
.bldg-active{font-size:10px;color:#9C5700;font-style:italic;margin-top:2px;}
.bldg-blocked{font-size:10px;color:#C00000;font-weight:bold;margin-top:2px;}
.matrix-wrap{overflow-x:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;}
.mtx{border-collapse:collapse;font-size:10px;min-width:100%;}
.mtx th{padding:5px 6px;text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;font-size:9px;position:sticky;top:0;}
.mtx th.tcol{text-align:left;min-width:180px;position:sticky;left:0;z-index:2;}
.mtx td{padding:3px 5px;border:1px solid #E8E8E8;text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;}
.mtx td.tname{background:white;text-align:left;position:sticky;left:0;font-size:9px;min-width:180px;border-right:2px solid #ccc;}
.mtx tr.ghdr td{color:white;font-weight:bold;font-size:9px;text-align:left;padding:3px 8px;}
.md{background:#C6EFCE;color:#276221;font-weight:bold;font-size:12px;}
.mp{background:#FFEB9C;color:#9C5700;font-weight:bold;font-size:12px;}
.mb{background:#FFE0E0;color:#C00000;font-weight:bold;}
.mn{background:#FAFAFA;color:#ccc;}
.trade-detail{padding:10px 12px;}
.detail-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;margin-bottom:2px;}
.detail-sub{font-size:10px;color:#808080;margin-bottom:10px;}
.group-hdr{color:white;font-weight:bold;font-size:10px;padding:5px 10px;border-radius:3px;margin:8px 0 3px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;}
.trade-row{background:white;border-radius:5px;padding:7px 9px;margin-bottom:3px;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.05);border-left:4px solid #D9D9D9;}
.trade-row.done{border-left-color:#276221;background:#F5FBF5;}
.trade-row.progress{border-left-color:#9C5700;background:#FFFDF0;}
.trade-row.blocked{border-left-color:#C00000;background:#FFF5F5;}
.trade-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.trade-name{font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;color:#333;flex:1;line-height:1.3;}
.trade-name.done{color:#276221;}.trade-name.progress{color:#9C5700;}.trade-name.blocked{color:#C00000;}
.status-sel{font-size:11px;padding:4px 3px;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid #ccc;background:white;cursor:pointer;max-width:140px;flex-shrink:0;}
.status-sel.done{background:#C6EFCE;color:#276221;border-color:#276221;font-weight:bold;}
.status-sel.progress{background:#FFEB9C;color:#9C5700;border-color:#9C5700;font-weight:bold;}
.status-sel.blocked{background:#FFE0E0;color:#C00000;border-color:#C00000;font-weight:bold;}
.status-pill{font-size:11px;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:4px;flex-shrink:0;font-weight:bold;}
.status-pill.done{background:#C6EFCE;color:#276221;}.status-pill.progress{background:#FFEB9C;color:#9C5700;}.status-pill.blocked{background:#FFE0E0;color:#C00000;}.status-pill.blank{background:#F2F2F2;color:#808080;font-weight:normal;}
.dates-row{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:5px;align-items:flex-end;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.date-grp{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;}
.date-lbl{font-size:9px;color:#808080;font-weight:bold;text-transform:uppercase;}
.date-inp{font-size:11px;padding:3px 5px;border:1px solid #D9D9D9;border-radius:4px;background:#FFF9E6;width:130px;}
.date-inp:focus{outline:none;border-color:#4472C4;}
.days-badge{font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;color:#375623;background:#E2EFDA;padding:3px 7px;border-radius:4px;white-space:nowrap;}
.trade-note-inp{width:100%;margin-top:4px;font-size:10px;padding:4px 6px;border:1px solid #E8E8E8;border-radius:4px;color:#595959;resize:none;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;background:#FAFAFA;}
.trade-note-inp:focus{outline:none;border-color:#4472C4;}
.section-box{background:white;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:10px;box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.07);}
.section-box-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;color:#1F3864;margin-bottom:6px;padding-bottom:4px;border-bottom:1px solid #E0E0E0;}
.notes-box{width:100%;padding:9px;border:1px solid #D9D9D9;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;color:#333;resize:none;background:#FFFDF0;line-height:1.5;}
.notes-box:focus{outline:none;border-color:#4472C4;}
.notes-box.ro{background:#F8F8F8;color:#595959;border-color:#E0E0E0;}
.photos-row{display:flex;gap:8px;overflow-x:auto;padding-bottom:5px;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;}
.photo-thumb{width:80px;height:80px;border-radius:6px;object-fit:cover;flex-shrink:0;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid #E0E0E0;}
.add-photo{width:80px;height:80px;border-radius:6px;border:2px dashed #4472C4;background:#F0F5FF;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;color:#4472C4;font-size:10px;gap:3px;}
.add-photo span{font-size:22px;}
.comment-item{background:#F8F8F8;border-radius:6px;padding:8px 10px;margin-bottom:5px;}
.comment-meta{font-size:9px;color:#808080;margin-bottom:3px;}
.comment-text{font-size:11px;color:#333;line-height:1.4;}
.comment-inp{width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #D9D9D9;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;resize:none;margin-bottom:5px;background:white;}
.comment-inp:focus{outline:none;border-color:#4472C4;}
.comment-btn{padding:7px 16px;background:#4472C4;color:white;border:none;border-radius:5px;font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;cursor:pointer;}
.summary-wrap{padding:12px;}
.summary-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:8px;margin-top:10px;}
.sum-card{background:white;border-radius:8px;padding:11px;box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.08);}
.admin-section{background:white;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px;box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.08);}
.admin-section h3{font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;color:#1F3864;margin-bottom:8px;padding-bottom:5px;border-bottom:1px solid #E0E0E0;}
.user-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #F0F0F0;font-size:11px;}
.user-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.user-role{font-size:9px;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:bold;}
.user-role.admin{background:#C6EFCE;color:#276221;}.user-role.staff{background:#DEEAF1;color:#2E5090;}.user-role.owner{background:#FFEB9C;color:#9C5700;}
.lightbox{display:none;position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,.92);z-index:999;justify-content:center;align-items:center;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;}
.lightbox.open{display:flex;}
.lightbox img{max-width:95vw;max-height:80vh;border-radius:8px;object-fit:contain;}
.lb-btn{color:white;font-size:12px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);border:none;padding:7px 16px;border-radius:16px;cursor:pointer;}
.lb-del{color:#FF6B6B;background:rgba(255,100,100,.15);border:1px solid #FF6B6B;}
.save-toast{position:fixed;bottom:18px;right:14px;background:#276221;color:white;padding:8px 14px;border-radius:20px;font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s;pointer-events:none;z-index:998;}
.save-toast.show{opacity:1;}
.loading-screen{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:60vh;gap:12px;color:#808080;}
.spinner{width:30px;height:30px;border:3px solid #E0E0E0;border-top-color:#4472C4;border-radius:50%;animation:spin .8s linear infinite;}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="lightbox" id="lightbox">
  <img id="lbImg" src="" alt="">
  <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;">
    <button class="lb-btn" onclick="closeLB()">Close</button>
    <button class="lb-btn lb-del" id="lbDel" onclick="delPhoto()" style="display:none">Delete</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- LOGIN -->
<div class="login-screen" id="loginScreen">
  <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="height:75px;width:auto;border-radius:8px;background:white;padding:6px 12px;margin-bottom:16px;" alt="MYM Logo">
  <div style="color:#90B8D8;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:22px;letter-spacing:1px;">PROJECT MANAGEMENT PLATFORM</div>
  <div class="login-box">
    <h2>Sign In</h2>
    <div class="role-tabs">
      <div class="role-tab active" id="tabAdmin" onclick="setLoginRole('admin')">Admin / Staff</div>
      <div class="role-tab" id="tabOwner" onclick="setLoginRole('owner')">Owner Portal</div>
    </div>
    <label class="field-label">Username</label>
    <input class="field-input" id="loginUser" placeholder="Enter username..." autocapitalize="none">
    <label class="field-label">Password</label>
    <input class="field-input" type="password" id="loginPass" placeholder="Enter password..." onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')doLogin()">
    <button class="login-btn" onclick="doLogin()">Sign In</button>
    <div class="login-err" id="loginErr">Incorrect username or password</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- MAIN APP -->
<div id="mainApp" style="display:none">
  <div class="topbar">
    <div class="topbar-row">
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="height:34px;width:auto;border-radius:4px;background:white;padding:2px 5px;" alt="MYM">
        <div>
          <h1>MYM DEVELOPERS</h1>
          <div class="topbar-sub"><span class="sync-dot" id="syncDot"></span><span id="syncLabel">Connecting...</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="topbar-right">
        <span class="role-badge" id="roleBadge"></span>
        <button class="signout-btn" onclick="doSignOut()">Sign Out</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="legend">
    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot" style="background:#C6EFCE;border:1px solid #276221"></div>Done</div>
    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot" style="background:#FFEB9C;border:1px solid #9C5700"></div>In Progress</div>
    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot" style="background:#FFE0E0;border:1px solid #C00000"></div>Blocked</div>
    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot" style="background:#F2F2F2;border:1px solid #D9D9D9"></div>Not Started</div>
  </div>
  <div class="nav-bar" id="navBar"></div>
  <div id="app"><div class="loading-screen"><div class="spinner"></div><div>Loading...</div></div></div>
</div>

<div class="save-toast" id="toast">✅ Saved</div>
<input type="file" accept="image/*" capture="environment" id="photoInput" style="display:none" onchange="handlePhoto(event)">

<!-- Firebase SDK -->
<script type="module">
import { initializeApp } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.0/firebase-app.js";
import { getDatabase, ref, set, get, onValue } from "https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/10.12.0/firebase-database.js";

const firebaseConfig = {
  apiKey: "AIzaSyASJbIYESwAAqW7kJnMwH3CxgLncVDjWck",
  authDomain: "mym-developers.firebaseapp.com",
  databaseURL: "https://mym-developers-default-rtdb.firebaseio.com",
  projectId: "mym-developers",
  storageBucket: "mym-developers.firebasestorage.app",
  messagingSenderId: "1078772882927",
  appId: "1:1078772882927:web:403bbebb56a0f51b6aaa1a"
};

const app = initializeApp(firebaseConfig);
const db = getDatabase(app);

// ══ USERS ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const USERS = [
  {u:"admin",      p:"MYM2025!",   role:"admin",  projects:null},
  {u:"office",     p:"MYMoffice",  role:"staff",  projects:null},
  {u:"super1",     p:"Super1pass", role:"staff",  projects:null},
  {u:"owner_vmg",  p:"VMG2025",    role:"owner",  projects:["VMG Phase 3"]},
  {u:"owner_shin", p:"Shin2025",   role:"owner",  projects:["Shinev Estates"]},
  {u:"owner_vb",   p:"VB2025",     role:"owner",  projects:["33 Van Buren"]},
  {u:"owner_viz",  p:"Viz2025",    role:"owner",  projects:["Viznitz"]},
  {u:"owner_483",  p:"P4832025",   role:"owner",  projects:["483 County Rt 105"]},
  {u:"owner_lp",   p:"LP2025",     role:"owner",  projects:["2 Lone Pine Dr"]},
];

// ══ TRADES ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const TRADES=[["T01","1.  Dig Foundation","#DEEAF1"],["T02","2.  Footings","#DEEAF1"],["T03","3.  Frost Walls","#DEEAF1"],["T04","4.  Waterproof Dropped Footings","#DEEAF1"],["T05","5.  Water / Sewer Trench","#DEEAF1"],["T06","6.  Deep Underground Plumbing","#DEEAF1"],["T07","7.  Backfill Foundation","#DEEAF1"],["T08","8.  Back Foundation Walls","#FCE4D6"],["T09","9.  Front Foundation Walls","#FCE4D6"],["T10","10. Underground Plumbing","#FCE4D6"],["T11","11. Backfill & Prep Slab","#FCE4D6"],["T12","12. Pour Slab","#FCE4D6"],["T13","13. Waterproof Foundation Walls","#FCE4D6"],["T14","14. Backfill Around Building","#FCE4D6"],["T15","15. Frame Basement","#E2EFDA"],["T16","16. Frame 1st Floor","#E2EFDA"],["T17","17. Steel Beams & Columns","#E2EFDA"],["T18","18. Frame 2nd Floor","#E2EFDA"],["T19","19. Frame 3rd Floor","#E2EFDA"],["T20","20. Frame 4th Floor","#E2EFDA"],["T21","21. Roof - Sheeting / Chimney / Shingles","#FFF2CC"],["T22","22. Windows / Stairs / Doors / Clean","#FFF2CC"],["T23","23. Standpipe","#E2D9F3"],["T24","24. Electrical - Boxes & High-Hats","#E2D9F3"],["T25","25. HVAC Rough-In","#E2D9F3"],["T26","26. Plumbing - Waste Lines","#E2D9F3"],["T27","27. Electrical - Rough-In","#E2D9F3"],["T28","28. Plumbing - Gas / Heat / Water","#E2D9F3"],["T29","29. Sprinkler Rough-In","#E2D9F3"],["T30","30. Low Voltage","#E2D9F3"],["T31","31. Elevators","#E2D9F3"],["T32","32. Siding","#D9EAD3"],["T33","33. Decks","#D9EAD3"],["T34","34. Steel for Decks","#D9EAD3"],["T35","35. Gutters","#D9EAD3"],["T36","36. Building Clean","#D9EAD3"],["T37","37. Walk-Through & Punch List #1","#D9EAD3"],["T38","38. Fire Stopping & Inspection","#D9EAD3"],["T39","39. Insulation","#F0E6D3"],["T40","40. 3D Documentation","#F0E6D3"],["T41","41. Insulation Inspection","#F0E6D3"],["T42","42. Sheetrock Delivery","#F0E6D3"],["T43","43. Sheetrock Installation","#F0E6D3"],["T44","44. Spackle","#F0E6D3"],["T45","45. Broom Cleaning","#F0E6D3"],["T46","46. Hardwood Flooring","#FCE4D6"],["T47","47. Tile Installation","#FCE4D6"],["T48","48. Boilers & Water Meters","#DEEAF1"],["T49","49. AC Grills / Thermostats / Switches","#DEEAF1"],["T50","50. Trimming","#E2EFDA"],["T51","51. Kitchen Delivery & Installation","#E2EFDA"],["T52","52. Granite / Countertops","#E2EFDA"],["T53","53. Wall Tiles","#E2EFDA"],["T54","54. Interior Railings & Handrails","#E2EFDA"],["T55","55. Walk-Through & Clean Before Paint","#FFF2CC"],["T56","56. Paint","#FFF2CC"],["T57","57. Hardware - Handles / Locks / Stoppers","#FFF2CC"],["T58","58. Sinks & Toilets","#FFF2CC"],["T59","59. Final Cleaning","#FFF2CC"],["T60","60. Unit Numbers & Directional Signage","#FFF2CC"]];
const GROUPS={"T01":["FOUNDATION & UNDERGROUND","#2E5090"],"T08":["FOUNDATION WALLS & SLAB","#C55A11"],"T15":["FRAMING","#375623"],"T21":["ROOF, WINDOWS & CLOSE-IN","#C55A11"],"T23":["ROUGH-IN (Sec 1-2 to 3-4 to 5-6)","#3B1F6E"],"T32":["EXTERIOR, SIDING & INSPECTIONS","#1F4E4E"],"T39":["INSULATION, SHEETROCK & SPACKLE","#4E3B1F"],"T46":["FLOORING","#C55A11"],"T48":["MEP FINISHES","#2E5090"],"T50":["TRIM, KITCHENS & COUNTERTOPS","#375623"],"T55":["PAINT & FINAL FINISHES","#C55A11"]};
const TIDX={};TRADES.forEach((t,i)=>TIDX[t[0]]=i);

const PROJECTS=[
  {id:"vmg3",name:"VMG Phase 3",color:"#1F3864",light:"#DEEAF1",
   buildings:["Lot 53","Lot 54","Lot 34","Lot 60","Lot 56","Lot 59","Lot 55","Lot 52","Lot 57","Lot 58","Lot 49","Lot 50","Lot 51"],
   defaults:{"Lot 53":{upTo:"T38"},"Lot 54":{upTo:"T38"},"Lot 34":{upTo:"T28",cur:"T29"},"Lot 60":{upTo:"T29",cur:"T30"},"Lot 56":{upTo:"T26",cur:"T27"},"Lot 59":{upTo:"T25",cur:"T26"},"Lot 55":{upTo:"T24",cur:"T25"},"Lot 52":{upTo:"T21",cur:"T22"},"Lot 57":{upTo:"T20",cur:"T21"},"Lot 58":{upTo:"T21",cur:"T22"},"Lot 49":{upTo:"T18",cur:"T19"},"Lot 50":{upTo:"T11",cur:"T12"},"Lot 51":{}}},
  {id:"vb",  name:"33 Van Buren",     color:"#375623",light:"#E2EFDA",buildings:["Main Building"],defaults:{}},
  {id:"shin",name:"Shinev Estates",   color:"#C55A11",light:"#FCE4D6",buildings:["Building 1","Building 2","Building 3"],defaults:{}},
  {id:"viz", name:"Viznitz",          color:"#3B1F6E",light:"#E2D9F3",buildings:["C1","C2","C3","C4","B1","B2","B3","B4","B5","B6","B7","D1","D2","D3","D4","A1","A2","A3"],defaults:{}},
  {id:"p483",name:"483 County Rt 105",color:"#1F4E4E",light:"#D9EAD3",buildings:["Main Building"],defaults:{}},
  {id:"lp",  name:"2 Lone Pine Dr",   color:"#4E3B1F",light:"#F0E6D3",buildings:["Main Building"],defaults:{}},
];

// ══ AUTH ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
let CU=null;
function setLoginRole(r){document.getElementById("tabAdmin").className="role-tab"+(r==="admin"?" active":"");document.getElementById("tabOwner").className="role-tab"+(r==="owner"?" active":"");}
function doLogin(){const u=document.getElementById("loginUser").value.trim(),p=document.getElementById("loginPass").value,f=USERS.find(x=>x.u===u&&x.p===p);if(f){CU=f;sessionStorage.setItem("mym_u",JSON.stringify(f));showApp();}else{document.getElementById("loginErr").style.display="block";document.getElementById("loginPass").value="";}}
function doSignOut(){sessionStorage.removeItem("mym_u");CU=null;document.getElementById("mainApp").style.display="none";document.getElementById("loginScreen").style.display="flex";document.getElementById("loginUser").value="";document.getElementById("loginPass").value="";document.getElementById("loginErr").style.display="none";}
function canEdit(){return CU&&(CU.role==="admin"||CU.role==="staff");}
function isAdmin(){return CU&&CU.role==="admin";}
function visProjects(){if(!CU)return[];if(CU.role==="admin"||CU.role==="staff")return PROJECTS;return PROJECTS.filter(p=>CU.projects&&CU.projects.includes(p.name));}


function showApp(){
  document.getElementById("loginScreen").style.display="none";
  document.getElementById("mainApp").style.display="block";
  const b=document.getElementById("roleBadge");
  b.textContent={admin:"Admin",staff:"Staff",owner:"Owner"}[CU.role]||CU.role;
  b.className="role-badge "+CU.role;
  buildNav();bootApp();
}
function buildNav(){
  const nav=document.getElementById("navBar");
  let h=`<button class="nav-btn active" id="btn-dashboard" onclick="setView('dashboard')">🏗 Projects</button>`;
  h+=`<button class="nav-btn" id="btn-summary" onclick="setView('summary')">📊 Summary</button>`;
  if(isAdmin())h+=`<button class="nav-btn" id="btn-admin" onclick="setView('admin')">⚙️ Admin</button>`;
  nav.innerHTML=h;
}

// ══ FIREBASE DATA ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
let DATA={},view="dashboard",activeProject=null,activeBuilding=null,saveTimer=null,bldgViewMode="cards";
let lbProj=null,lbBldg=null,lbIdx=null,pendingPhotoProj=null,pendingPhotoBldg=null;

function setSyncStatus(s){
  const d=document.getElementById("syncDot"),l=document.getElementById("syncLabel");
  if(!d)return;
  d.className="sync-dot"+(s==="saving"?" saving":s==="error"?" error":"");
  l.textContent=s==="saving"?"Saving...":s==="error"?"Connection error — retrying":"Live ✓";
}

function dbKey(projId,bldg){return projId+"__"+bldg.replace(/[\s.#$\[\]/]/g,"_");}

function fillDefaults(){
  PROJECTS.forEach(proj=>{
    proj.buildings.forEach(bldg=>{
      const k=dbKey(proj.id,bldg);
      if(!DATA[k])DATA[k]={};
      if(!DATA[k]._photos)DATA[k]._photos=[];
      if(!DATA[k]._ownerNote)DATA[k]._ownerNote="";
      if(!DATA[k]._comments)DATA[k]._comments=[];
      const def=proj.defaults[bldg];
      if(def&&!DATA[k]._defaultsApplied){
        TRADES.forEach((t,ti)=>{
          if(!DATA[k][t[0]]){
            let st="";
            if(def.upTo&&TIDX[def.upTo]!==undefined&&ti<=TIDX[def.upTo])st="Done";
            else if(def.cur&&t[0]===def.cur)st="In Progress";
            DATA[k][t[0]]={status:st,startDate:"",endDate:"",notes:""};
          }
        });
        DATA[k]._defaultsApplied=true;
      }else{TRADES.forEach(t=>{if(!DATA[k][t[0]])DATA[k][t[0]]={status:"",startDate:"",endDate:"",notes:""};});}
    });
  });
}

async function loadFromFirebase(){
  try{
    setSyncStatus("saving");
    const snapshot=await get(ref(db,"mym_platform"));
    if(snapshot.exists()){DATA=snapshot.val();}
    setSyncStatus("live");
  }catch(e){setSyncStatus("error");}
  fillDefaults();
}

function saveToFirebase(){
  setSyncStatus("saving");
  clearTimeout(saveTimer);
  saveTimer=setTimeout(async()=>{
    try{
      await set(ref(db,"mym_platform"),DATA);
      setSyncStatus("live");showToast();
    }catch(e){setSyncStatus("error");}
  },800);
}

// Real-time listener — any change by anyone updates all screens instantly
function startListener(){
  onValue(ref(db,"mym_platform"),(snapshot)=>{
    if(snapshot.exists()){
      const fresh=snapshot.val();
      // Only update if not currently saving (avoid overwrite)
      if(!saveTimer){DATA=fresh;fillDefaults();render();}
    }
  });
}

function showToast(){const t=document.getElementById("toast");t.classList.add("show");setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove("show"),1800);}

// ══ STATS ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function bStats(projId,bldg){const k=dbKey(projId,bldg),d=DATA[k]||{};let done=0,prog=0,blk=0;TRADES.forEach(t=>{const s=(d[t[0]]||{}).status||"";if(s==="Done")done++;else if(s==="In Progress")prog++;else if(s==="Blocked")blk++;});return{done,prog,blk,total:TRADES.length};}
function pStats(proj){let td=0,tt=0,tb=0;proj.buildings.forEach(b=>{const s=bStats(proj.id,b);td+=s.done;tt+=s.total;tb+=s.blk;});return{pct:Math.round(td/tt*100)||0,done:td,total:tt,blk:tb};}
function scls(s){if(s==="Done")return"done";if(s==="In Progress")return"progress";if(s==="Blocked")return"blocked";return"";}
function calcDays(s,e){if(!s||!e)return null;const d=Math.round((new Date(e)-new Date(s))/86400000);return d>0?d:null;}

// ══ VIEWS ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function setView(v,pId,bldg){view=v;activeProject=pId||null;activeBuilding=bldg||null;document.querySelectorAll(".nav-btn").forEach(b=>b.classList.remove("active"));const btn=document.getElementById("btn-"+(v==="buildings"||v==="trades"?"dashboard":v));if(btn)btn.classList.add("active");render();window.scrollTo(0,0);}


function render(){const app=document.getElementById("app");if(view==="dashboard")app.innerHTML=renderDash();else if(view==="buildings")app.innerHTML=renderBldgs(activeProject);else if(view==="trades")app.innerHTML=renderTrades(activeProject,activeBuilding);else if(view==="summary")app.innerHTML=renderSummary();else if(view==="admin")app.innerHTML=renderAdmin();}

function renderDash(){
  const ps=visProjects();
  let h=`<div class="dashboard"><div class="dash-title">Active Projects (${ps.length})</div><div class="project-grid">`;
  ps.forEach(p=>{const s=pStats(p);h+=`<div class="project-card" onclick="setView('buildings','${p.id}')"><div class="pc-header" style="background:${p.color}"><div><div class="pc-name">${p.name}</div><div class="pc-count">${p.buildings.length} building${p.buildings.length>1?"s":""}</div></div><div class="pc-pct">${s.pct}%</div></div><div style="height:5px;background:#E2EFDA"><div style="height:5px;width:${s.pct}%;background:${p.color};transition:width .4s;"></div></div><div class="pc-body"><div class="pc-stat"><span>Done</span><strong>${s.done}/${s.total}</strong></div>${s.blk>0?`<div class="pc-stat"><span>Blocked</span><strong style="color:#C00000">${s.blk}</strong></div>`:""}<button class="pc-open" style="background:${p.color}">Open Project →</button></div></div>`;});
  return h+"</div></div>";
}

function renderBldgs(projId){
  const proj=PROJECTS.find(p=>p.id===projId);if(!proj)return"";
  const toggles=`<div class="view-toggle"><button class="vt-btn ${bldgViewMode==="cards"?"active":"inactive"}" onclick="setBldgView('cards')">📋 Cards</button><button class="vt-btn ${bldgViewMode==="grid"?"active":"inactive"}" onclick="setBldgView('grid')">🗂 Full Grid</button></div>`;
  if(bldgViewMode==="grid")return renderGrid(proj);
  let h=`<div class="bldg-list"><button class="back-btn" onclick="setView('dashboard')">← All Projects</button><div class="section-title" style="color:${proj.color}">${proj.name}</div>${toggles}<div class="bldg-grid">`;
  proj.buildings.forEach(b=>{
    const s=bStats(projId,b),pct=Math.round(s.done/s.total*100),k=dbKey(projId,b);
    const at=TRADES.find(([tid])=>(DATA[k]||{})[tid]?.status==="In Progress");
    h+=`<div class="bldg-card" onclick="setView('trades','${projId}','${b.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}')"><div class="bldg-name">${b}</div><div class="bldg-bar-wrap"><div class="bldg-bar" style="width:${pct}%;background:${proj.color}"></div></div><div class="bldg-pct" style="color:${proj.color}">${pct}%</div><div class="bldg-stats">${s.done}/${s.total} done${s.prog>0?" · "+s.prog+" active":""}</div>${at?`<div class="bldg-active">🔄 ${at[1]}</div>`:""}${s.blk>0?`<div class="bldg-blocked">⛔ ${s.blk} blocked</div>`:""}</div>`;
  });
  return h+"</div></div>";
}

function renderGrid(proj){
  const toggles=`<div class="view-toggle"><button class="vt-btn inactive" onclick="setBldgView('cards')">📋 Cards</button><button class="vt-btn active">🗂 Full Grid</button></div>`;
  let h=`<div class="bldg-list"><button class="back-btn" onclick="setView('dashboard')">← All Projects</button><div class="section-title" style="color:${proj.color}">${proj.name}</div>${toggles}<div class="matrix-wrap"><table class="mtx"><tr><th class="tcol" style="background:#1F3864;color:white;">TRADE</th>${proj.buildings.map(b=>`<th style="background:${proj.color};color:white;">${b}</th>`).join("")}</tr>`;
  TRADES.forEach(([tid,tname])=>{
    if(GROUPS[tid])h+=`<tr class="ghdr"><td colspan="${1+proj.buildings.length}" style="background:${GROUPS[tid][1]};">${GROUPS[tid][0]}</td></tr>`;
    h+=`<tr><td class="tname">${tname}</td>`;
    proj.buildings.forEach(b=>{
      const k=dbKey(proj.id,b),s=(DATA[k]||{})[tid]?.status||"";
      const bg=s==="Done"?"#C6EFCE":s==="In Progress"?"#FFEB9C":s==="Blocked"?"#FFE0E0":"#FAFAFA";
      const fg=s==="Done"?"#276221":s==="In Progress"?"#9C5700":s==="Blocked"?"#C00000":"#ccc";
      const sym=s==="Done"?"✓":s==="In Progress"?"▶":s==="Blocked"?"✕":"";
      h+=`<td style="background:${bg};color:${fg};text-align:center;font-weight:bold;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;" onclick="setView('trades','${proj.id}','${b.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}');">${sym}</td>`;
    });
    h+=`</tr>`;
  });
  h+=`<tr><td style="background:#1F3864;color:white;font-weight:bold;font-size:9px;padding:5px 8px;position:sticky;left:0;">COMPLETE</td>${proj.buildings.map(b=>{const s=bStats(proj.id,b),pct=Math.round(s.done/s.total*100);const bg=pct===100?"#C6EFCE":pct>0?"#FFEB9C":"#F2F2F2";const fg=pct===100?"#276221":pct>0?"#9C5700":"#808080";return`<td style="background:${bg};color:${fg};text-align:center;font-weight:bold;font-size:10px;padding:4px 5px;">${pct}%</td>`;}).join("")}</tr>`;
  return h+"</table></div></div>";
}

function renderTrades(projId,bldg){
  const proj=PROJECTS.find(p=>p.id===projId);if(!proj)return"";
  const k=dbKey(projId,bldg),s=bStats(projId,bldg),pct=Math.round(s.done/s.total*100);
  const photos=(DATA[k]||{})._photos||[],ownerNote=(DATA[k]||{})._ownerNote||"",comments=(DATA[k]||{})._comments||[];
  const canEd=canEdit(),safeKey=k.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/gi,"");
  let h=`<div class="trade-detail"><button class="back-btn" onclick="setView('buildings','${projId}')">← ${proj.name}</button><div class="detail-title" style="color:${proj.color}">${bldg}</div><div class="detail-sub">${proj.name} · ${s.done}/${s.total} complete (${pct}%)</div>
  <div class="section-box"><div class="section-box-title">📷 Site Photos</div><div class="photos-row">${photos.map((p,i)=>`<img class="photo-thumb" src="${p}" onclick="openLB('${projId}','${bldg.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}',${i})">`).join("")}${canEd?`<div class="add-photo" onclick="triggerPhoto('${projId}','${bldg.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}')"><span>+</span><span>Photo</span></div>`:(photos.length===0?'<span style="font-size:10px;color:#808080;">No photos yet</span>':'')}</div></div>
  <div class="section-box"><div class="section-box-title">💬 Update for Owner</div><textarea class="notes-box${!canEd?" ro":""}" rows="2" placeholder="${canEd?"Write an update for the owner...":"No update yet."}" ${!canEd?"readonly":""} onchange="updateOwnerNote('${projId}','${bldg.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}',this.value)">${ownerNote}</textarea></div>
  <div class="section-box"><div class="section-box-title">💬 Comments</div>${comments.map(c=>`<div class="comment-item"><div class="comment-meta">${c.user} · ${c.role} · ${c.time}</div><div class="comment-text">${c.text}</div></div>`).join("")}<textarea class="comment-inp" rows="2" id="ci-${safeKey}" placeholder="Add a comment..."></textarea><button class="comment-btn" onclick="addComment('${projId}','${bldg.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}')">Post</button></div>
  <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:bold;color:#1F3864;margin:8px 0 6px;padding-top:6px;border-top:2px solid #E0E0E0;">🔧 Trade Status</div>`;
  TRADES.forEach(([tid,tname])=>{
    if(GROUPS[tid])h+=`<div class="group-hdr" style="background:${GROUPS[tid][1]}">${GROUPS[tid][0]}</div>`;
    const td=(DATA[k]||{})[tid]||{},st=td.status||"",cls=scls(st),days=calcDays(td.startDate,td.endDate);
    h+=`<div class="trade-row ${cls}"><div class="trade-top"><div class="trade-name ${cls}">${tname}</div>`;
    if(canEd){h+=`<select class="status-sel ${cls}" onchange="updateStatus('${projId}','${bldg.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}','${tid}',this.value)"><option value=""${!st?" selected":""}>—</option><option value="Done"${st==="Done"?" selected":""}>Done</option><option value="In Progress"${st==="In Progress"?" selected":""}>In Progress</option><option value="Not Started"${st==="Not Started"?" selected":""}>Not Started</option><option value="Blocked"${st==="Blocked"?" selected":""}>Blocked</option></select>`;}
    else{const pc=st==="Done"?"done":st==="In Progress"?"progress":st==="Blocked"?"blocked":"blank";h+=`<span class="status-pill ${pc}">${st||"Not Started"}</span>`;}
    h+=`</div>`;
    if(canEd){h+=`<div class="dates-row"><div class="date-grp"><div class="date-lbl">Start</div><input type="date" class="date-inp" value="${td.startDate||""}" onchange="updateField('${projId}','${bldg.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}','${tid}','startDate',this.value)"></div><div class="date-grp"><div class="date-lbl">End</div><input type="date" class="date-inp" value="${td.endDate||""}" onchange="updateField('${projId}','${bldg.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}','${tid}','endDate',this.value)"></div>${days!==null?`<div class="days-badge">⏱ ${days}d</div>`:""}</div><textarea class="trade-note-inp" rows="1" placeholder="Note..." onchange="updateField('${projId}','${bldg.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}','${tid}','notes',this.value)">${td.notes||""}</textarea>`;}
    else{if(td.startDate||td.endDate){h+=`<div class="dates-row">`;if(td.startDate)h+=`<div class="date-grp"><div class="date-lbl">Start</div><div style="font-size:11px;padding:3px 5px;color:#595959;">${td.startDate}</div></div>`;if(td.endDate)h+=`<div class="date-grp"><div class="date-lbl">End</div><div style="font-size:11px;padding:3px 5px;color:#595959;">${td.endDate}</div></div>`;if(days!==null)h+=`<div class="days-badge">⏱ ${days}d</div>`;h+=`</div>`;}if(td.notes)h+=`<div style="font-size:10px;color:#808080;font-style:italic;margin-top:3px;">${td.notes}</div>`;}
    h+=`</div>`;
  });
  return h+"</div>";
}

function renderSummary(){
  const ps=visProjects(),today=new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-US",{month:"long",day:"numeric",year:"numeric"});
  let h=`<div class="summary-wrap"><div class="dash-title">📊 Weekly Summary</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#808080;margin-bottom:8px;">As of ${today}</div><div class="summary-grid">`;
  ps.forEach(proj=>{proj.buildings.forEach(bldg=>{const s=bStats(proj.id,bldg),pct=Math.round(s.done/s.total*100),k=dbKey(proj.id,bldg);const at=TRADES.find(([tid])=>(DATA[k]||{})[tid]?.status==="In Progress");const note=(DATA[k]||{})._ownerNote||"";h+=`<div class="sum-card"><div style="font-size:9px;color:#808080;font-weight:bold;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:2px;">${proj.name}</div><div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:bold;color:#1F3864;margin-bottom:5px;">${bldg}</div><div style="height:7px;background:#E2EFDA;border-radius:4px;margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="height:100%;border-radius:4px;width:${pct}%;background:${proj.color};"></div></div><div style="font-size:14px;font-weight:bold;color:#375623;">${pct}%</div><div style="font-size:10px;color:#808080;margin-top:2px;">${s.done}/${s.total} trades${s.prog>0?" · "+s.prog+" active":""}</div>${at?`<div style="font-size:10px;color:#9C5700;font-style:italic;margin-top:3px;">🔄 ${at[1]}</div>`:""}${s.blk>0?`<div style="font-size:10px;color:#C00000;font-weight:bold;margin-top:2px;">⛔ ${s.blk} blocked</div>`:""}${note?`<div style="font-size:10px;color:#595959;font-style:italic;margin-top:4px;border-left:2px solid ${proj.color};padding-left:5px;">${note.substring(0,60)}${note.length>60?"...":""}</div>`:""}</div>`;});});
  return h+"</div></div>";
}

function renderAdmin(){
  return`<div class="dashboard"><div class="dash-title">⚙️ Admin Panel</div><div class="admin-section"><h3>Owner Login Credentials</h3>${USERS.filter(u=>u.role==="owner").map(u=>`<div class="user-row"><span><strong>${u.projects?u.projects.join(", "):"All"}</strong></span><span style="font-size:10px;color:#595959;font-family:monospace;">${u.u} / ${u.p}</span></div>`).join("")}</div><div class="admin-section"><h3>All Users</h3>${USERS.map(u=>`<div class="user-row"><span><strong>${u.u}</strong>${u.projects?" — "+u.projects.join(", "):""}</span><span class="user-role ${u.role}">${u.role}</span></div>`).join("")}</div><div class="admin-section"><h3>Projects</h3>${PROJECTS.map(p=>{const s=pStats(p);return`<div class="user-row"><span><strong>${p.name}</strong> — ${p.buildings.length} bldgs</span><span style="font-weight:bold;color:#375623;">${s.pct}%</span></div>`;}).join("")}</div></div>`;
}

// ══ UPDATE HANDLERS ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function updateStatus(projId,bldg,tid,val){if(!canEdit())return;const k=dbKey(projId,bldg);if(!DATA[k])DATA[k]={};if(!DATA[k][tid])DATA[k][tid]={status:"",startDate:"",endDate:"",notes:""};DATA[k][tid].status=val;if(val==="In Progress"&&!DATA[k][tid].startDate)DATA[k][tid].startDate=new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0];if(val==="Done"&&!DATA[k][tid].endDate)DATA[k][tid].endDate=new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0];saveToFirebase();render();}
function updateField(projId,bldg,tid,field,val){if(!canEdit())return;const k=dbKey(projId,bldg);if(!DATA[k])DATA[k]={};if(!DATA[k][tid])DATA[k][tid]={status:"",startDate:"",endDate:"",notes:""};DATA[k][tid][field]=val;saveToFirebase();if(field!=="notes")render();}
function updateOwnerNote(projId,bldg,val){const k=dbKey(projId,bldg);if(!DATA[k])DATA[k]={};DATA[k]._ownerNote=val;saveToFirebase();}
function addComment(projId,bldg){const k=dbKey(projId,bldg),safeKey=k.replace(/[^a-z0-9]/gi,""),inp=document.getElementById("ci-"+safeKey);if(!inp||!inp.value.trim())return;if(!DATA[k])DATA[k]={};if(!DATA[k]._comments)DATA[k]._comments=[];DATA[k]._comments.push({user:CU.u,role:CU.role,time:new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-US",{month:"short",day:"numeric",hour:"2-digit",minute:"2-digit"}),text:inp.value.trim()});saveToFirebase();render();}


// ══ PHOTOS ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function triggerPhoto(projId,bldg){if(!canEdit())return;pendingPhotoProj=projId;pendingPhotoBldg=bldg;document.getElementById("photoInput").click();}
function handlePhoto(e){const file=e.target.files[0];if(!file)return;const reader=new FileReader();reader.onload=ev=>{const img=new Image();img.onload=()=>{const canvas=document.createElement("canvas");const MAX=800;let w=img.width,h=img.height;if(w>MAX){h=Math.round(h*MAX/w);w=MAX;}if(h>MAX){w=Math.round(w*MAX/h);h=MAX;}canvas.width=w;canvas.height=h;canvas.getContext("2d").drawImage(img,0,0,w,h);const k=dbKey(pendingPhotoProj,pendingPhotoBldg);if(!DATA[k])DATA[k]={};if(!DATA[k]._photos)DATA[k]._photos=[];DATA[k]._photos.push(canvas.toDataURL("image/jpeg",.7));saveToFirebase();render();};img.src=ev.target.result;};reader.readAsDataURL(file);e.target.value="";}
function openLB(projId,bldg,idx){lbProj=projId;lbBldg=bldg;lbIdx=idx;const photos=(DATA[dbKey(projId,bldg)]||{})._photos||[];document.getElementById("lbImg").src=photos[idx];document.getElementById("lbDel").style.display=canEdit()?"block":"none";document.getElementById("lightbox").classList.add("open");}
function closeLB(){document.getElementById("lightbox").classList.remove("open");lbProj=lbBldg=lbIdx=null;}
function delPhoto(){if(!canEdit()||lbProj===null)return;const k=dbKey(lbProj,lbBldg);DATA[k]._photos.splice(lbIdx,1);closeLB();saveToFirebase();render();}




// ══ EXPOSE ALL FUNCTIONS TO WINDOW (required for onclick in HTML) ═════════════
window.doLogin=doLogin;
window.doSignOut=doSignOut;
window.setLoginRole=setLoginRole;

window.updateStatus=updateStatus;
window.updateField=updateField;
window.updateOwnerNote=updateOwnerNote;
window.addComment=addComment;
window.triggerPhoto=triggerPhoto;
window.handlePhoto=handlePhoto;
window.openLB=openLB;
window.closeLB=closeLB;
window.delPhoto=delPhoto;
window.setView=setView;
window.setBldgView=function(m){bldgViewMode=m;render();};
window.render=render;

// ══ BOOT ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
async function bootApp(){
  await loadFromFirebase();
  render();
  startListener();
}

const saved=sessionStorage.getItem("mym_u");
if(saved){try{CU=JSON.parse(saved);showApp();}catch(e){}}
</script>
</body>
</html>
